label_verbatim: (Name of Maine or Foreign Limited Liability Company)
rationale: LLC name as it appears on the SOS record. Must match record exactly so SOS can identify the entity whose registered-agent slot is being vacated. Domestic and foreign LLCs both use entity.name on this form (the form is dual-purpose); contrast with MLLC-12 (foreign LLC) which uses entity.home_jurisdiction_name on its body — that distinction does not apply on this resignation form because the entity is identified by its on-record Maine name regardless of domicile.

label_verbatim: FIRST: (name of current noncommercial registered agent)
rationale: Name of the noncommercial registered agent of record (i.e., the resigning party / filer). Same canonical key family as MBCA-12E-NCRA / MBCA-6 / MBCA-12 / MLLC-12 etc.; the resignation context is implicit from form_id and form_name, no separate 'resigning_agent.*' namespace needed. (Drafter initially proposed resigning_agent.name; corrected during review per MBCA-12E-NCRA precedent.)

label_verbatim: (physical street address, city, state and zip code – as it appears on the record)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the noncommercial registered agent of record. Form explicitly says 'as it appears on the record' — the value must match the SOS record verbatim, not the agent's current preferred address.

Name of the natural person at the LLC to whom the agent will deliver the §111-required notice of resignation (mandatory predicate for the resignation to take effect 31 days later). Reuses MBCA-12E-NCRA's resignation_notice.* namespace rather than coining notification_recipient.*.
Mailing address (single line incl. ZIP) where the notice will be sent.

Title of the person at the LLC receiving the notice. Form caption is more permissive than MBCA-12E-NCRA's '(title of corporate officer)' — LLCs can be member- or manager-managed, so the recipient title may be 'Manager', 'Member', 'Authorized Person', etc. rather than restricted to corporate-officer titles.
Date the statement of resignation is signed; resignation takes effect 31 days after this filing is delivered to the LLC.

label_verbatim: (type or print name) — below the (signature of resigning noncommercial registered agent) caption
rationale: Signer printed name. Single widget, no separate title field on this form; matches Shape B of filing-signer-shape (name only) per MBCA-12E-NCRA precedent. The signer is by definition the resigning noncommercial RA whose name was already entered at Text2; redundant by design (form acts as both attestation and signature).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite enum value '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite enum value 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($35 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (applies to the LLC; resignation does not affect the LLC's annual-report obligations — only the agent slot).
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
